revision.text:
{{Object | Name=The Swinging Guillotine | Guid=3055-7731 | Deck=A type of cutting trap that prevents us from moving freely around the location | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Instant_Death,Concepts/Trap | Franchises= | Games=Games/Adventure_of_Little_Ralph,Games/Blood_Omen_Legacy_of_Kain,Games/Die_by_the_Sword,Games/Drakan_Order_of_the_Flame,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Mythologies_Sub_Zero,Games/Resident_Evil_4,Games/The_Elder_Scrolls_V_Skyrim | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Ball_and_Chain,Objects/Guillotine,Objects/Spike_Ball | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3782567-mortalkombatmythologysub-zero-theswingingguillotine.jpg }}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=Thigh-High Boots | Guid=3055-7783 | Deck=Boots that go up to the thighs. Almost always include high heels and usually worn by women. | Characters=Characters/Angol_Fear,Characters/Arachne,Characters/Baroness,Characters/Blonde_Blazer,Characters/Brunnya,Characters/Camilla_32956,Characters/Captain_Marvel,Characters/Cassandra_Alexandra,Characters/Catwoman,Characters/Colossus,Characters/Coupe,Characters/Emma_Frost,Characters/Harley_Quinn,Characters/Hilde_von_Krone,Characters/Invisible_Woman,Characters/Ishtar_22709,Characters/Jean_Grey,Characters/Kang_the_Conqueror,Characters/Miranda_Lawson,Characters/Mystique,Characters/Nova,Characters/Phyla_Vell,Characters/Poison_Ivy,Characters/Power_Girl,Characters/Prism,Characters/Psylocke,Characters/Raven_8266,Characters/Scarlet_Witch,Characters/Selene_18686,Characters/Star_Sapphire_28884,Characters/Starfire,Characters/Storm,Characters/Valeera_Sanguinar,Characters/Vixen,Characters/Yennefer_of_Vengerberg,Characters/Zatanna | Concepts=Concepts/Alternate_Costume,Concepts/Femme_Fatale,Concepts/Sexualized_Women,Concepts/Superhero,Concepts/Supervillain | Franchises= | Games=Games/Batman_Arkham_City,Games/Batman_Arkham_Knight,Games/DC_Universe_Online,Games/Dispatch,Games/Fire_Emblem_Fates,Games/Fire_Emblem_Fuuin_no_Tsurugi,Games/Fire_Emblem_Heroes,Games/Fire_Emblem_Seisen_no_Keifu,Games/Heroes_of_the_Storm,Games/Infinite_Crisis,Games/Injustice_2,Games/Injustice_Gods_Among_Us,Games/League_of_Legends,Games/Marvel_Avengers_Alliance,Games/Marvel_Cosmic_Invasion,Games/Marvel_Future_Fight,Games/Marvel_Rivals,Games/Marvel_Super_Heroes,Games/Marvel_Ultimate_Alliance,Games/Marvel_Ultimate_Alliance_2,Games/Marvel_Ultimate_Alliance_3_The_Black_Order,Games/Marvel_vs_Capcom_2_New_Age_of_Heroes,Games/Marvel_vs_Capcom_3_Fate_of_Two_Worlds,Games/Marvel_vs_Capcom_Fighting_Collection_Arcade_Classics,Games/Mass_Effect_2,Games/Mass_Effect_3,Games/Mass_Effect_Legendary_Edition,Games/Smite,Games/Soulcalibur_IV,Games/Soulcalibur_V,Games/Soulcalibur_VI,Games/The_Witcher_3_Wild_Hunt,Games/Ultimate_Marvel_vs_Capcom_3,Games/Unicorn_Overlord,Games/World_of_Warcraft | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Boots,Objects/High_Heels | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3822475-screenshot2025-11-10000611.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3822475-screenshot2025-11-10000611.png","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Boots that go up to the thighs. Almost always include high heels and usually worn by women.

{{Object | Name=Thrasher | Guid=3055-7423 | Deck=Zowie Scott's spaceship. It only appears in the MSX version of Salamander. | Characters=Characters/Zowie_Scott | Concepts=Concepts/Music_Reference,Concepts/Player_2_Character | Franchises= | Games=Games/Konami_Antiques_MSX_Collection_Ultra_Pack,Games/Konami_Antiques_MSX_Collection_Vol_3,Games/Life_Force | Locations=Locations/Space | People= | Objects=Objects/Laser,Objects/Missile,Objects/Spaceship | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3593030-1976354788-latest.jpg }}

It only appears in the MSX version of Salamander.

{{Object | Name=Thunder Hammer | Guid=3055-7399 | Deck=A futuristic take on a classic warhammer used by Space Marines and others in the setting of Warhammer 40,000. | Characters=Characters/Captain_Titus,Characters/Gabriel_Angelos,Characters/Mordecai_Toth | Concepts=Concepts/Adeptus_Astartes,Concepts/Black_Templar,Concepts/Blood_Ravens,Concepts/Imperial_Fists,Concepts/Inquisitor,Concepts/Iron_Warriors,Concepts/Night_Lords,Concepts/Space_Marine,Concepts/Space_Wolves,Concepts/Ultramarines | Franchises= | Games=Games/Warhammer_40_000_Dawn_of_War,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Dawn_of_War_III,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Space_Marine,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Space_Marine_II | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Hammer,Objects/War_Hammer | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3545992-screenshot2024-02-06052630.png }}

{{Object | Name=Tissue Paper | Guid=3055-7301 | Deck=Tissue paper is a commodity that many use for anything from being sick, crying, and even toilet paper substitutes. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Life_Is_Strange,Games/Like_a_Dragon_Gaiden_The_Man_Who_Erased_His_Name,Games/Lost_Judgment,Games/Omori,Games/Project_Zomboid | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Paper,Objects/Paper_Towel,Objects/Toilet,Objects/Toilet_Paper,Objects/Trash,Objects/Tree | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3507803-nat5701.jpg }}

{{Object | Name=Toaster Oven | Guid=3055-7370 | Deck=A toaster oven is a small electric oven that uses heated coils to toast food. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Marvels_Spider_Man_2 | Locations=Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Microwave,Objects/Oven,Objects/Pizza,Objects/Toaster | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3520939-www.krupsusa.jpg }}

{{Object | Name=Tortilla Chips | Guid=3055-7336 | Deck=Tortilla Chips are triangular fried corn tortillas. | Characters=Characters/Beavis,Characters/Big_Boss,Characters/Butthead,Characters/Fred_Fredburger,Characters/Hellboy,Characters/Ron_Stoppable,Characters/Rufus_14762 | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Cook_Serve_Delicious,Games/Cook_Serve_Delicious_3,Games/Doritos_VR_Battle,Games/Marvels_Spider_Man_2,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_HD_Collection,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_Peace_Walker,Games/Saints_Row_2,Games/Scott_Pilgrim_vs_The_World_The_Game,Games/Scribblenauts,Games/Scribblenauts_Unlimited,Games/Taco_Bell_Tasty_Temple_Challenge,Games/The_Grim_Adventures_of_Billy_And_Mandy,Games/The_Sims_2,Games/Uno_2016 | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/Mexico,Locations/Mexico_City,Locations/New_Mexico,Locations/New_York,Locations/New_York_City,Locations/North_America,Locations/Pacific_Ocean,Locations/Restaurant,Locations/San_Diego,Locations/South_America,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Ventura_County | People= | Objects=Objects/Burrito,Objects/Cheese,Objects/Corn,Objects/Deep_Fryer,Objects/Doritos,Objects/Hamburger,Objects/Mountain_Dew,Objects/Nachos,Objects/Potato_Chips,Objects/Sandwich,Objects/Taco,Objects/Tortillas,Objects/Vegetable_Oil | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3514140-tortilla-chips-7.jpg }}

{{Object | Name=Toyota Corolla | Guid=3055-7514 | Deck=Toyota Corolla was a popular international compact model that was available for four different body styles. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Rally,Concepts/Toyota_Motor_Corporation | Franchises= | Games=Games/Counter_Strike_Source,Games/Drift_Spirits,Games/Forza_Horizon,Games/Forza_Horizon_4,Games/Forza_Horizon_5,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6,Games/Gran_Turismo,Games/Gran_Turismo_2,Games/Gran_Turismo_2009,Games/Gran_Turismo_3_A_Spec,Games/Gran_Turismo_4,Games/Gran_Turismo_5,Games/Gran_Turismo_6,Games/Gran_Turismo_7,Games/GT_Advance_2_Rally_Racing,Games/Half_Life_Counter_Strike,Games/Michelin_Rally_Masters_Race_of_Champions,Games/Need_for_Speed_V_Rally_2,Games/Rally_Challenge_2000,Games/The_Getaway,Games/Tokyo_Xtreme_Racer_3,Games/Tokyo_Xtreme_Racer_Drift,Games/Tokyo_Xtreme_Racer_Drift_2,Games/V_Rally_3,Games/WRC_10_FIA_World_Rally_Championship | Locations=Locations/Australia,Locations/Brazil,Locations/Canada,Locations/Indonesia,Locations/Japan,Locations/New_Zealand,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/United_Kingdom | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Race_Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3810611-img_3474.jpeg }}

{{Object | Name=Toyota RAV 4 | Guid=3055-7612 | Deck=Compact crossover SUV produced by the Japanese automobile manufacturer Toyota. It is known for starting the wave of compact crossovers. The RAV4 is one of the best-selling SUVs of all time. By February 2020, a total of 10 million RAV4s had been sold globally. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Licensed_Cars,Concepts/Rally,Concepts/Toyota_Motor_Corporation | Franchises= | Games=Games/Car_Town,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6_Apex,Games/Forza_Motorsport_7,Games/Michelin_Rally_Masters_Race_of_Champions,Games/Rally_Fusion_Race_of_Champions | Locations=Locations/Japan | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Sports_Utility_Vehicle | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3648945-7093038884-002.j.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3648945-7093038884-002.j.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Compact crossover SUV produced by the Japanese automobile manufacturer Toyota. It is known for starting the wave of compact crossovers. The RAV4 is one of the best-selling SUVs of all time. By February 2020, a total of 10 million RAV4s had been sold globally.

{{Object | Name=Triple Barrel Shotgun | Guid=3055-7617 | Deck=This is a kind of shotgun who has 3 barrels instead of usually 1 or 2, this weapon often exists as a fictional weapon or as a home made one | Characters=Characters/Edward_Carnby | Concepts=Concepts/Exploding_Head,Concepts/Gib | Franchises= | Games=Games/Alone_in_the_Dark_The_New_Nightmare,Games/ATOM_RPG_Post_Apocalyptic_Indie_Game,Games/Kreed | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Ammo,Objects/Double_Barreled_Shotgun,Objects/Explosive_Shotgun_Shells,Objects/Gun,Objects/Hydra_3407,Objects/Quad_Barrel_Shotgun,Objects/Sawed_Off_Shotgun,Objects/Shotgun,Objects/Shotgun_Shells | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3721495-aloneinthedarkthenewnightmare.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3721495-aloneinthedarkthenewnightmare.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_medium,scale_super,square_small,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_mini,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":"Alone in the Dark - The New Nightmare"},"background":[]}' /> This is a kind of shotgun who has 3 barrels instead of usually 1 or 2, this weapon often exists as a fictional weapon or as a home made one

revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Trombone | Guid=3055-7367 | Deck=The trombone is a brass instrument that is used in many orchestras. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Busking,Concepts/Music_Creation,Concepts/Musicians,Concepts/Victory_Music | Franchises= | Games=Games/Children_of_Silentown,Games/Marvels_Spider_Man_2,Games/Wii_Music | Locations=Locations/Concert_Stage,Locations/Europe,Locations/France,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Saxophone,Objects/Sheet_Music,Objects/Trumpet | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3520914-yamaha_tenor_trombone_ysl-891z_%28re-crop%29.jpg }}

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Tunnel Boring Machine | Guid=3055-7740 | Deck=Any massive drilling machine designed to tunnel underground | Characters=Characters/Rocksteady,Characters/Shredder,Characters/Tora_24575 | Concepts=Concepts/Advancing_Wall_of_Doom,Concepts/Destructible_Environment,Concepts/Digging,Concepts/Foot_Clan,Concepts/Instant_Death,Concepts/Miner,Concepts/Mining,Concepts/Tubular_Transport | Franchises= | Games=Games/Contra_Shattered_Soldier,Games/Dead_Space_2,Games/Drakan_Order_of_the_Flame,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_V,Games/Injustice_Gods_Among_Us,Games/Quake_II,Games/Red_Faction,Games/Resident_Evil_4,Games/Taz_in_Escape_from_Mars,Games/Teenage_Mutant_Ninja_Turtles_1989,Games/Teenage_Mutant_Ninja_Turtles_Shredders_Revenge,Games/Teenage_Mutant_Ninja_Turtles_The_Cowabunga_Collection,Games/The_Callisto_Protocol | Locations=Locations/Mine,Locations/The_Technodrome,Locations/Underground | People= | Objects=Objects/Drill,Objects/Miners_Helmet,Objects/Pickaxe | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3786628-teenagemutantninjaturtlesshredder%E2%80%99srevenge.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3786628-teenagemutantninjaturtlesshredder\u2019srevenge.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_medium,scale_super,square_avatar,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> In games, it often becomes a transport for getting to new locations, a deadly enemy from which you need to escape, and if it is massive enough and has a platform for transporting equipment, then it becomes an arena for battles.

{{Object | Name=Type 11 LMG | Guid=3055-7407 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Medal_of_Honor_Rising_Sun | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=UFC Championship Belt | Guid=3055-7628 | Deck=The UFC Championship Belt is the goal of most fighters on the roster. It means that the fighter won a championship in their weight class. | on_Woodley,Characters/Vitor_Belfort It means that the fighter won a championship in their weight class.

{{Object | Name=VW Polo | Guid=3055-7545 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/V_Rally_3 | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/VW_Polo_R_WRC }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=VW Polo R WRC | Guid=3055-7544 | Deck=The Volkswagen Polo R WRC is a World Rally Car built and operated by Volkswagen Motorsport and based on the Volkswagen Polo for use in the World Rally Championship. The car, which made its début at the start of the 2013 season, is built to the second generation of World Rally Car regulations that were introduced in 2011, which are based upon the existing Super 2000 regulations, but powered by a turbocharged 1.6-litre engine rather than the naturally aspirated 2-litre engine found in Super 2000 cars. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Rally | Franchises= | Games=Games/WRC_10_FIA_World_Rally_Championship,Games/WRC_5 | Locations=Locations/Germany | People= | Objects=Objects/VW_Polo }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The Volkswagen Polo R WRC is a World Rally Car built and operated by Volkswagen Motorsport and based on the Volkswagen Polo for use in the World Rally Championship. The car, which made its début at the start of the 2013 season, is built to the second generation of World Rally Car regulations that were introduced in 2011, which are based upon the existing Super 2000 regulations, but powered by a turbocharged 1.6-litre engine rather than the naturally aspirated 2-litre engine found in Super 2000 cars.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Whisk | Guid=3055-7372 | Deck=A whisk is a cooking utensil that is made for whipping liquids like cream or eggs. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Marvels_Spider_Man_2,Games/Project_Zomboid | Locations=Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Cream,Objects/Egg,Objects/Whipped_Cream | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3520945-41dr3%2Bzzjpl._ac_uf894%2C1000_ql80_.jpg }}

{{Object | Name=White Wine | Guid=3055-7304 | Deck=White wine is the wine fermented from the pulp of lighter grapes. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Lost_Judgment | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Alcoholic_Beverages,Objects/Grapes,Objects/Red_Wine,Objects/Wine | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3507806-220px-white_wine_glas.jpg }}

{{Object | Name=Yakisoba | Guid=3055-7328 | Deck=Yakisoba is a fried noodle dish popular in Japan. | Characters=Characters/Artoria_Pendragon,Characters/Kei_Ayamine,Characters/Megumi_Yakushiji,Characters/Takatoshi_Hijiyama,Characters/Takayuki_Yagami | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/13_Sentinels_Aegis_Rim,Games/Castlevania_Portrait_of_Ruin,Games/Fate_Extella_The_Umbral_Star,Games/Lost_Judgment,Games/Muv_Luv,Games/Muv_Luv_Alternative,Games/Persona_5,Games/Persona_5_Royal | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/Japan,Locations/Tokyo | People= | Objects=Objects/Cup,Objects/Fried_Rice,Objects/Meat,Objects/Mung_Bean_Sprouts,Objects/Noodles,Objects/Rice,Objects/Water,Objects/Yakisoba_Pan | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3511755-yakisoba.png }}

{{Object | Name=Yarmulke | Guid=3055-7334 | Deck=A yarmulke, also known as a Kippah, is a traditional Jewish cap worn as a customary obligation to cover one's head. | Characters=Characters/Eric_Cartman,Characters/Gerald_Broflovski,Characters/Ike_Broflovski,Characters/Kyle_Broflovski,Characters/The_New_Kid,Characters/Thing | Concepts=Concepts/Judaism | Franchises= | Games=Games/Marvels_Spider_Man_2,Games/South_Park_The_Fractured_But_Whole,Games/South_Park_The_Stick_of_Truth | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/California,Locations/Europe,Locations/Germany,Locations/Israel,Locations/Jerusalem,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/New_York,Locations/New_York_City,Locations/Poland,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Ventura_County | People= | Objects=Objects/Beanie,Objects/Coin,Objects/Hat | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3513613-istockphoto-115065593-612x612.jpg }}
